journal_date.text: วันที่ทำรายการ

root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_year, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.doc_no, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.gl_date, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date, case when sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id = 'PV' then 'ใบสำคัญจ่าย' when sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id = 'RV' then 'ใบสำคัญรับ' when sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id = 'JV' then 'ใบสำคัญรายวัน' else '' end as acc_book_type_name, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id, case when sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount > 0 then 'เดบิต' when sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount > 0 then 'เครดิต' else '' end as nature, '' item_amount, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.desc_journal_detail, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.item_close_status, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.entry_date, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.entry_id FROM sc_acc_m_general_ledger WHERE 1=1 /*WHERE*/
